## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:ci` passes (and live tests if relevant)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md` / `ARCHITECTURE.md`) if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data in the diff
